string.text: Aye, you're a right cunt aren't yah?
My I served in the empire's army for 2 days with my hot quim and pert tids. I always left the Legionaries balls empty.
Soon, I earnt a reputation as a Dick Destroyer. I destroyed countless dicks in cold blood. Ah the good ole' days, before somesones wife showed up and kicked us whores out.
I been using my moneypurse between the legs ever since.
Your service to the empire was glorious. They should have told the wife to fuck off.
Why did the wife want you gone?
Aye, they be jealous of my cunt prowess. I am unstoppable!
I earnt me-self a reputation as a Dick Destroyer from my countless drained cocks in the imperial army. You must have met my kind before. You should know what we are capable of in the bedroom.
Aye, you're a right cunt aren't yah?
My tits. You were looking at them weren't you?
You shouldn't be ashamed. Every coomer in Caladria has jerked to these perkys. The lucky have jerked off on them.
I have been using my tits to earn denars... I am the paizuri CHAMPION
Your perkies are magnificent. I too see the appeal of jerking off on them.
Aye, they are better than that slut Rhagaea's perkies.
I have magnificent tits.
Hail adventurer!
You have the traveler's look about you. I take it you spend much of your time out in the wilds?
Don't look so taken aback, it's a compliment! You're not like the other slack jawed yokels around here, I can tell.
I've had my fill of this lot, and I'm open to hire if you have need of a traveling companion.
I am not one to cower behind walls. Glory awaits us both if you would but join me.
Is that a nice way of saying I smell bad?
We can do much together!
Fortune favours the bold!
Oi! Would you like to see my beef curtain?!
My pussy lips are super thiccc and juicy. The thickest beef curtain in all of Caladria.
Don't look so taken aback! Certain circles pay good money for a painting or wood block print of my ultra thick labia.
My massive pussy lips could probably envelop your cock in it's entirety. Unless you are hung like an elephant.
No madam, my penis does not rival an elephants. Your thick beef curtain will best me.
I, in fact, have an elephant penis. Just you wait!
Excellent! Friendship is magic!
My beef curtains will conquer Caladria!!
BUUURRRP!! Oh, excuse me mi'lord.
I have just knocked back a load or two of man chowder.
Don't look so taken aback! A girl had to earn her keep in this world.
These lads had just been on campaign against bandits and their balls had been overflowing with cum. They dam near drowned me! Say... Do you have a warband that needs a sperm burping guttersnipe?
No madam, you disgust me.
I, in fact, would love to have a sperm burping guttersnipe amongst our degenerate band of warriors!
Excellent! Flop that cock out!
I'll suck your cock for coin!!!
Is that a knife in your pocket? Or are you just happy to see me?
I have a penchant for thievery. Everyone stares at my bosom and I lift their coin in the chaos.
Don't look so taken aback! A girl had to earn her keep in this world.
I will gladly life some coin for you… Or some raw paizuri for coin.
No madam, you disgust me.
Paizuri you say? You are hired!!
Excellent! I have a satchel of lingerie I need to get before we go!!
I'll paizuri for coin!!!
Oi! Do you know what Rhagaea’s panties smell like?
I do. I got a job as a maid in Rhagaea’s keep. I used to leave her anonymous notes professing my love about her chambers.
I would write hidden love sonnets within her books.
Eventually, I was caught sniffing her soiled underthings. The aroma from her crotch was exhilarating… They were caked with her juices and smelled of heaven!
So… You steal panties? You are a pantie thief?
Well… You have great taste. I too simp for Rhagaea.
Oh! You love Rhagaea too? Let’s mutually masturbate to this tits ass wood carving of Rhagaea I stole from the keep in Onira.
I am a panty thief and love to smell soiled underthings!!!
Oi! Ira of House Pethros is the most beautiful woman in all Caladria!!
I was a cook in the legion. I used to stare at her from afar and masturbate furiously after my work was done.
Eventually, my lust overtook me and I started to masturbate to our commander while cooking.

They say a good chef includes some of herself in every meal. I was caught squirting my steaming hot girl juices into the stew after a rowdy fap session to the tan goddess known as Ira of House Pethros. Can you believe they threw me out for that?!
So… You put your girl fap juices into the stew… Because you were filled with lust from gazing upon Rhagaea’s daughter?
Well… You have great taste. I too simp for Ira.
Oi! I can make a great stew on the campaign trail! Have you got any wood carvings or paintings of Ira?
I an Ira stalker, but also a good cook!!
My story? Well then...
I come from a humble background. My parents were farmers, tending to their crops every day, until the tax collectors came.

Harvest was bad that season, and the tax collectors were merciless when we do not have enough denars to pay their overpriced taxes. They took my ass as payment. My parents watched... My father started jerking... The fucking degenerate.
I hated those greedy lords, they do not care about us normal peasants. That is why...I devoted my life to ass murder these corrupted lords and protect the common people.
Yes, those lords should have cared more about their people instead of extorting from them.
Murder? Caladria fuck yeah!
I do not care much about those lords. If your party is planning on eradicating corrupted lords, I am more than willing to assist you on your journey.
I am but a mere assassin that is devoted to protecting the common people. I am sure you have seen others like me around.
My story? Well then...
I worked in the letcher Queen Calatild’s castle. I was her Jizz Mopper you see.
She jerks many manhoods in the morn and twice in the evening. Spills seed wherever she is. At the dinner table, at prayer, in the bath, on the shitter… Loads of coom shot all about the castle.
I hate that bastard for jerking cocks anywhere she pleases! I know she is the Queen. But forcing a young girl like me to mop up coom ad nauseam… She is a real cunt!
Yes, Queen Calatild should be courteous enough to toss coom out a window, or into a cup. Maybe even a sock.
Jizz mopping? Would you like to mop jizz around my bivouac area?
Aye… Jizz mopping is all I know. Just please be courteous about where you shoot your cum.
I was a jizz mopper for Queen Calatild.
My story? You look like a fellow gooner...
I worked in the stables of House dey Arromanc. It was there I first caught sight of her… The most beautiful creature…
Silvind you dolt! Not that fucking whore Rhagaea! Get the fuck out of here! Why would Rhagaea even be around you cunt!
Sorry… I lost myself in the passion… The unquenchable thirst I have for Silvind.
Wow. Just wow.
You know… I think Silvind is really hot too. Welcome aboard.
Ahh… I see you are a man of culture as well.
I am a simp for Silvind of House dey Arromanc.
My story? You look like a fellow coomer...
I worked in the kitchens of House dey Arromanc. It was there I first caught sight of her… The most beautiful creature…
Queen Calatild you dolt! Not that fucking whore Silvind! Get the fuck out of here!
Silvind is nothing but a cheap copy of the silver fox known as Queen Calatild!!
Wow. Just wow.
You know… I think Queen Calatild is THE SILVER HAIRED FOX!! YEAH BABY!!
Ahh… I see you are a man of culture as well.
I am a simp for Queen Calatild of House dey Arromanc.
My story? You seem like a man of culture...
House dey Putain my ninja! Vlandian bad girl Nikita Bellucci is BEST WAIFU!!
You see her do double anal?!! Her gapes and ability to take several penises at once in the same hole is wildly arousing!
Fuck those cheap whores Liena, Calatild and Silvind. For real.
So... You are just a degenerate?
YEAH MAN!! SHE IS LIKE… THE GAPED CRUSADER!!
Ahh… I see you are a man of culture as well.
I am a simp for Baroness Nikita Bellucci of House dey Putain.
My story? Did you know Queen Calatild is a degenerate?
She keeps a secret Harem… Of girls he absconds from all about Caladria.
She doesn't care if they are sweet Vlandian lasses, perky Imperial thots, THICCC Sturgians, randy Battanian girls or hot poes Khuzaits!
I don’t know how she finds time to run his kingdom… All she does is bugger the poor girls in her harem!
So... How do you know about all this? Wikipedia?
Yeah… Calatild is a fucking creep man!
Ummm… I may have spent some time in her Harem…
I was formally buggered in Calatilds hidden harem.
Oi! I was a nanny for House dey Arromanc!
Calatild… She might be a lecher and obsessed with sodomy, but the kingdom ran smoothly. Thanks to me I think!
Originally, I was just a whore in her harem… But soon I tasked with watching her children.
Soon after that, I was tasked with running her kingdom… So he could have more time to bugger poor farm girls. I know my way around running a fief… or several.
This explains so much!
Yeah… Calatild is a woman of culture alright.
Ummm… Let me run your Vlandian fiefs!
I was formally buggered in Calatilds hidden harem. Then became a nanny.
Well met, I shall share my past.
Born in the cold mountains, everyday is a struggle for survival. Food, water and warmth are too much of a luxury for my family to afford.
I always had worked hard just to support my family's survival, however it was not enough. That was when I realized, working smart is always better than working hard.
The knowledge that I possess is what had gotten me here today. And I will use it, to get everything I want...no matter how inhumane my methods are.
I understand your past. Survival in the mountains was never easy. If you are to join my party, what skills can you offer?
Inhumane methods? My penis can only get so erect!
I am known as the Busty Tactician from where I came from. My methods and knowledge will grant you success, regardless of how cruel it is.
I am a busty tactician that is seeking to join a party. I am sure you have method other people like me before. We do whatever it takes to survive.
Hey there! Do you like Svana of House Vagiroving?
Born in the cold mountains of the North, I was able to keep warm… By snuggling Svana’s massive bosom.
Her massive sweater meats enveloped me whole… Like a mother’s womb.
They are magnificent aren’t they? Her pert baby feeders?
I like boobs.
Svana of House Vagiroving? My penis can only get so erect!
I am a lover of boobs. Especially Svana of House Vagirovings massive white peaks.
I am a boob fanatic.
Hey there! Do you like Siga of House Kuloving?
Oh man is she a milf! I lust after her mountainous white whoo whoos!
I just want to sniff them… Just a waft!
She could pee in a goblet and I would drink her holy water ambrosia… Gods! Just talking about it is making me juicy!
Wow! Are all Sturgians degenerates?
Siga of House Kuloving? STURGIA FUCK YEAH!!
I am a lover of boobs. Especially Siga of House Kulovinga massive white peaks.
I am a boob fanatic.
Oi! You’re a right cunt aren’t yah?
Apolanea is the best waifu in Sturgia. I know the lands are filled with Siga and Svana simps…
Just gaze upon her noble stature…
Her ample bosom… Thick ass… What I assume to be a never ending dripping quim…
Wow! Are all Sturgians degenerates?
Apolanea of House Kuloving? STURGIA FUCK YEAH!!
I am a lover of boobs. Especially Apolanea of House Kulovinga massive white peaks.
I am a boob fanatic.
Oi! So you know what Gerontophilia is??
Dakhila is the best waifu in Sturgia. I know the lands are filled with Siga, Apolanea and Svana simps…
Dakhila the Silver Fox! Her pussy must smell like Grand Prince Raganvad’s father’s foreskin cheese!
Her ancient orifices… Just waiting to be be plundered by a woman of culture like myself.
Wow! Are all Sturgians degenerates?
Dakhila of House Kostoroving? I too have a fondness for the old…
I am a lover of old ladies. Especially Dakhila of House Kostoroving.
I am a Gerontophilia fanatic.
Oi! I am the Sootikin Bandit and proud of it!
A sootikin you say?
One defines a 'sootikin' as a small mouse-shaped deposit formed in the vaginal cleft of poor women who did not wear undergarments.
When it reaches a certain size and weight, it tends to work loose and drop from under the woman's skirt. I have left sootikins all about Caladria.
I think I am going to throw up.
Say… Do you happen to have any sootikins for sale? You know… For good luck like a rabbit’s foot!
I left sootikins about all of Caladria. It is a better place for it!
I am Sootikin Bandit!.
Ah, you are interested to hear my tale?
Since I became legal, I always wet. I still remember the first time I soaked my trousers through, it was exhilarating.
After all these years of being moist, I have earned many titles by my peers and lords, but my favourite title is the one that was given by father - Always Wet
I shall admit this, after all these years of being wet, I seek a bigger cock.
Always wet? Indeed sounds cool and fitting.
Always wet? Can I sample this quim myself?
Buy a girl a drink first! I was given that title for a reason. Let me join you and I will prove it.
I am an always wet archer that is seeking to join a party. I am sure you have method similar people like me before.
Oi! Do you got some MEAT?
I could really use a sausage roll. Not a vegan one though... Cause I love MEAT...
Thick juicy meat logs are all I desire. I don’t eat or sleep or mow the lawn… I just think of meat logs all day long.
Bwahahha!! Have yah got meat logs in yer little warband do yah?
I am not sure what to say.
OI! I GOT YER THICCC MEAT LOG RIGHT HERE OI!?
Oh! Now I am hungry… for MEAT.
I am a meat log fanatic.
For me, I really like Corein.
It's Corein!! A small lump with huge knobs!! She has the juice… SHE HAS THE JUICE!
I can't imagine a more beautiful thing! Woo! It's Corein!!
I can tell you all about her!! I mean, look at her quim! When I tried it with butter, everything changed!
You madam, are a gentlewoman and a scholar.
COREIN FUCK YEAH!!
Oh! You wanna sing about Corein too?
I am a Corein fanatic.
Oi! You like big tiddy goth girlfriends?
It's Ladogual!! A queen of darkness!
My life is misery at best… But with Ladogual at my side, we could sail the stygian seas of life together in the blackness of the world!!
What say you chap?! Do you too, desire a bid tiddy goth girlfriend?
You madam, are a gentlewoman and a scholar.
LADOGUAL FUCK YEAH!!
Oh! You wanna write goth poems together?
I am a Ladogual fanatic.
Oi! You like big Battanian women?
I do… You could say that Caladog is my CalaDAWG!
See what I did there? DAWG instead of DOG.
Now if I could just get that randy cunt to raw dog me in the alleys of Marunath… Oh I am getting all moist!
I cannot say that I have ever gotten an erection whilst thinking about Highking Caladog. Now Corein… Shit… IT'S YE'OLDE BONER TYME!!
I too, am gay for CalaDAWG!
Oh! Slum in Marunath?
I am a Caladog fanatic.
Oi! Are ye wolfkin then??
I am… a REAL FURRY.
I howl at the moon and fornicate in the forest. I SUP AT MOTHER NATURE'S BOSOM!
Would you care to feed me RAW MEAT and RAW WOLF me in the alley?
Oh fuck it!!
I don’t know what to say madam. But I can identify as a wolf too if that helps.
Oh! Let’s yiff! Wait, you say that is only foxkin? How do you know this??
I am a Chosen Furry.
It's natural that you want to hear my story. I am famous after all.
Back when I was serving the Khuzait, my outstanding dick riding was often noticed by my superiors. I have never left a dick still hard. I am UNDEFEATABLE!
However, the army was holding me back. The dicks they provided, the balls we were sent to empty... All too easy.
My allies? Weak. I am better off finding someone who will not scoff when I want to ride them Amazon style. I deserve better!
I think I love you.
Aye, you deserve better! Ride me amazon style!
Anyways, I am never going back! My nickname as the Dick Rider should be striking fear into the dicks of the people!
Hmph! Have you not heard of me?! I am the unstoppable Dick Rider!
I am the most famous Dongchugger!
Monchug loves her dong chuggers. We who service his male vassals are Dongchuggers.
I serviced her cadre of cocks countless times… But I was cast away eventually. She only wanted girls that looked like Rhagaea.
All of us Khuzait Dongchuggers were replaced by olive skinned Imperial THOTS. What is this world coming to?
I think you deserve better. Please chug dongs in my warband.
Monchug has an Imperial fetish… Really?
I was an Elite Dongchugger in Makeb! My talents will serve you well.
Hmph! Have you not heard of me?! I am the unstoppable DONGCHUGGER!
Mela of House Oburit I say!
Best waifu in all of Khuzait… NAY THE WORLD.
I know there are tons of Yana, Abagai and even Mesui simps. Hell… I will admit Bolat has her days..
BUT MELA OF HOUSE OBURIT IS IT. THE FINAL ANSWER IN WAIFU!!
I too simp for Mela. Well said madam.
I dunno man… I really like Asa Akira.
I simp for Mela. If you disagree… Eat shit and die!
MELA 4 LYFE!
Oi! So you know what Gerontophilia is??
Queen Mesui is the best waifu in Khuzait. I know the lands are filled with Abagai, Yana and Bolat simps…
Queen Mesui the Silver Fox! Her pussy must smell like Monchug’s father’s foreskin cheese!
Her ancient orifices… Just waiting to be be plundered by a woman of culture like myself.
Wow! Are all Khuzaits degenerates?
MESUI THE SILVER HAIRED FOX? I too have a fondness for the old…
I am a lover of old ladies. Especially Mesui.
I am a Gerontophilia fanatic.
Oi! Abagai my ninja!??
Abagai is the best waifu in Khuzait. I know the lands are filled with Yana and Bolat simps…
Abagai the Dick Rider! Her pussy must smell like heaven itself… Her squirt must taste like holy ambrosia!
Her hot orifices… Just waiting to be be plundered by a woman of culture like myself.
Wow! Are all Khuzaits degenerates?
Abagai. Yeah… She is pretty sweet yo!
I am a Abagai simp. You should be too.
I am a Abagai fanatic.
Oi! You fap to Yana!?? Yana of House Khergit?
Yana is the best waifu in Khuzait. I know the lands are filled with Abagai and Bolat fappers
But have you really thought about Yana? NON STOP FAPPING ACTION!!
I usually cannot even get out of bed, I am exhausted from fapping to Yana all day and night.
Wow! Are all Khuzaits degenerates?
Yana. Yeah… She is pretty sweet yo!
I am a Yana fapper. You should be too.
I am a Yana fanatic.
Oh, you wish to hear my story? No problem.
I used to help my parents to sell the crops they harvested. Interestingly, whenever I was around, customers come flocking to me to buy the crops.
That was when I realized my talent of looking really fucking hot. It was very easy to earn denars. And I want to earn even more!
They kept coming back because they were a bunch of simps
I understand. You can never have too much denars!
I love money too. But I am no simp. Except for Rhagaea... That is totally different.
Heh. I was nicknamed as the Golddigger Legend from the people I have helped in doing my businesses. My talents can surely help your party make denars.
Good day to your sir! I consider myself to be an expert golddigger. You should have heard of me before.
Oh, you wish to hear my story? Only if you are a man of culture.
I used to work in the stables of House Banu Sarran. It was there I first saw her.
Her beauty took my breath away! Like a bronze goddess striding Caladria demanding true women of culture to simp.
I can only masturbate to Arwa now. I am faithful only to her.
I understand. Arwa makes me juicy too!
I have to pass. I only lust for Rhagaea.
Simpin’ ain't easy dude. I can teach you how.
I am an Arwa ubersimp.
Oi! Do you know the good word?
I used to work in the kitchens of House Banu Atij. It was there I first saw her.
Her beauty took my breath away! Like an ebony goddess striding Caladria demanding true women of culture to simp.
I can only masturbate to Zuad now. I am faithful only to her.
I understand. Zuad makes me juicy too!
I have to pass. I only lust for Rhagaea.
Simpin’ ain't easy dude. I can teach you how.
I am an Zuad ubersimp.
Oi! I like big butts and I cannot lie.
You other brothers can't deny. That when a girl walks in with an itty bitty waist. And a round thing in your face.
You get sprung, want to pull up tough. 'Cause you noticed that butt was stuffed. Deep in the jeans she's wearing. I'm hooked and I can't stop staring.
What I am saying is… Thiqa is fucking THICCCWA DOG!
Are you a minstrel perhaps?
I have to pass. I only lust for Rhagaea.
Simpin’ ain't easy dude. I can teach you how.
I am an Thiqa ubersimp and minstrel.
Oi! I got a scalding hot quim yah know?
It is wildly hot, wet and always hungry.
My quim rivals Arwa’s… Zuad’s… All the greatest quims of Aserai!!.
Let me join your warband, that I may share my hot quim!
Like… Hotter than Arwa’s quim?? Really?
I have to pass. I only lust for Rhagaea.
My quim will pierce the heavens!.
My quim will conquer Caladria!
My story? It is a simple tale really.
My father was a great merchant and he wanted me to follow in his footsteps.
Then I discovered Onlyfans. I can earn up to 1600 Denars a month from my own home!
That is only like 80 subscribers paying 20 Denars a month. I can teach you how to Onlyfans as well.
What the fuck!? Why am I breaking my ass running this godforsaken warband risking my life when I could just be a THOT?
I love money. More than pussy. Probably because money can buy pussy. Welcome to the crew.
Onlyfans will guide you to heaven.
My quim will conquer Caladria!
